---
title: "SFB Language between Redundancy and Deficiency"
---

{{< lipsum 1 >}}

```{r}

library(tidyverse)

publications <- read_csv('publications/publication_list.csv')


publications %>% 
  arrange(date) %>% 
  pull(publication) %>% 
  str_replace('(https://.*)','[\\1](\\1)') %>% 
  str_c('- ',.,'\n\n') %>% 
  cat(file='publications/publication_list.qmd') 


```



{{< include publications/publication_list.qmd >}}
